title: Fashion Friday with Le Tote
excerpt: Normally I am not one to get hooked on a fashion subscription service, but I am really loving Le Tote . I have been trying it for a couple months now, and have a feeling I might be sticking with…
body:
Normally I am not one to get hooked on a fashion subscription service, but I am really loving Le Tote. I have been trying it for a couple months now, and have a feeling I might be sticking with it for some time. They send 3 articles of clothing and 2 accessories for you to borrow, keep or send back. So far I've sent most of it back, but the pieces I have chosen to keep, I absolutely LOVE.

This is what I got in my first tote. I only decided to keep the black dress, even though I did wear the grey tee shirt a couple times, and you may recognize in this video.

As much as I love the navy dress I'm wearing in these photos, I decided not to keep it as it's just a little too snug in the shoulders and chest. I don't think I would have figured this out if I was just trying it on in a dressing room. This service allows me to try it on in the comfort of my own home, and I can even walk around the neighborhood and jump around in it before deciding what to do with it. There's also an option to review your tote and make any changes for 24 hours, which is great because you get to pick and choose what is sent. Another thing I love about Le Tote is that you can put your subscription on hold or cancel at anytime. Perfect for any fashionista who just wants to give this a try for a month. Plus you can get a $25 credit to Le Tote by signing up here!
